items.title: Multidomain Lifestyle Intervention in Mild Cognitive Impairment: Subgroup Analysis of the SUPERBRAIN-MEET Randomized Trial.
items.abstract: Mild cognitive impairment (MCI) is a high-risk stage for progression to dementia. The SUPERBRAIN-MEET trial previously demonstrated cognitive benefits of a multidomain lifestyle intervention (MLI) delivered through face-to-face sessions and digital platforms. The aim of this study was to examine whether the cognitive effects of the MLI varied according to sociodemographic characteristics, digital readiness, baseline cognitive status, and vascular risk profiles, in a prespecified subgroup analysis of the SUPERBRAIN-MEET randomized controlled trial. SUPERBRAIN-MEET was a 24-week, multicenter, outcome assessor-blinded, parallel-group randomized controlled trial conducted across 17 hospitals in South Korea. Adults aged 60-85 years with MCI were randomly assigned (1:1) to the MLI or control group. Subgroups were defined based on sociodemographic factors (sex, age, education, and living status), digital readiness (internet access, frequency of digital device use), cognitive status (MMSE score), and vascular risk profiles (body mass index [BMI], obesity status, smoking status, systolic and diastolic blood pressure, serum total cholesterol, low-density lipoprotein cholesterol, high-density lipoprotein cholesterol, fasting plasma glucose, and cardiovascular comorbidity). The primary outcome was the change in the repeatable battery for the assessment of neuropsychological status (RBANS) total index score from baseline to 24 weeks. Effect modification was assessed using linear mixed-effects models with interaction terms and false discovery rate correction. Of 300 randomized participants, 277 participants (mean age, 72.9 years; 69.3% female) were included in the modified intention-to-treat analysis (142 in the MLI group and 135 in the control group). MLI significantly improved RBANS total index scores compared with control at 24 weeks (between-group difference, 4.17 points; 95% CI 1.92-6.43). No subgroup interactions remained significant after false discovery rate correction, indicating consistent effects across subgroups. In this subgroup analysis of the SUPERBRAIN-MEET trial, the cognitive benefits of MLI were not significantly modified by sociodemographic factors, digital readiness, baseline cognitive status, or vascular risk profiles. These findings should be interpreted with caution, given the exploratory nature of subgroup analyses and limited statistical power. The results support the generalizability and scalability of technology-assisted multidomain lifestyle interventions for dementia prevention in older adults with MCI. The trial was registered at ClinicalTrials.gov (NCT05023057; submitted August 20, 2021; first patient enrolled September 3, 2021; URL: clinicaltrials.gov/study/NCT05023057).
items.summary_ja:
背景：軽度認知障害（MCI）は認知症への進行リスクが高い状態であり、SUPERBRAIN-MEET試験では多領域生活習慣介入（MLI）が認知機能改善に有効であることが示されている。  
方法：韓国の17病院で60～85歳のMCI患者300名を対象に、24週間のMLI群と対照群に無作為割付けし、性別、年齢、教育歴、デジタル利用状況、認知機能、血管リスク因子などのサブグループごとに認知機能変化（RBANSスコア）を比較した。  
結果：277名の解析で、MLI群は対照群に比べて24週後のRBANS総合スコアが有意に改善（群間差4.17点、95%CI 1.92-6.43）した。サブグループ間で効果の有意な差は認められず、社会人口学的要因やデジタル準備度、認知機能初期状態、血管リスクによらず一貫した効果が示された。  
結論：MLIの認知機能改善効果は多様な背景を持つ高齢MCI患者に広く適用可能であり、テクノロジー支援型の多領域介入の普及・拡大に有用である。ただし、サブグループ解析の探索的性質と統計的検出力の限界を考慮する必要がある。
items.summary_short_ja: 軽度認知障害（MCI）患者を対象としたSUPERBRAIN-MEET試験のサブグループ解析により、多面的生活習慣介入（MLI）は性別、年齢、教育、デジタル利用状況、認知機能、血管リスクに関わらず認知機能を有意に改善した。これにより、MLIの認知改善効果は幅広いMCI高齢者に一般化可能であり、デジタル支援を活用した認知症予防介入の普及が期待される。

items.title: Exploring Between-Study Heterogeneity in Extended-Window IV Thrombolysis for Acute Ischemic Stroke: A Meta-Analysis of 18 Randomized Controlled Trials.
items.abstract: IV thrombolysis (IVT) is the standard-of-care evidence-based treatment of eligible patients with acute ischemic stroke (AIS) within 4.5 hours of symptom onset. Emerging evidence supports its use beyond this time window, leading to expanded recommendations for selected patients presenting between 4.5 and 24 hours. We performed a systematic review and meta-analysis to evaluate IVT in the 4.5- to 24-hour window and to explore sources of between-study heterogeneity. We searched MEDLINE, Cochrane Library, and ClinicalTrials.gov from inception through February 2026. Eligible studies were randomized controlled trials (RCTs) or individual patient-data meta-analyses of RCTs comparing IVT with control in patients with AIS presenting beyond 4.5 hours from last known well. The primary outcome was excellent functional recovery, defined as a modified Rankin Scale (mRS) of 0-1 at 90 days. Secondary outcomes included functional independence (mRS of 0-2 at 90 days); change in mRS disability, quantified as the common odds ratio (OR) for a 1-point improvement across the full ordinal mRS distribution (ordinal analysis); and safety measures such as 90-day mortality and symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage (sICH). Risk ratios (RRs) with 95% CIs were pooled. Multivariable meta-regression simultaneously modeled thrombolytic agent, endovascular thrombectomy context, and territory to disentangle confounded predictors. Fifteen studies representing 18 RCTs and encompassing 5,168 patients were included in the primary analysis. Of the 18 included RCTs, 11 required advanced perfusion imaging (CTP or MRP mismatch) or diffusion-weighted imaging/fluid-attenuated inversion recovery mismatch to confirm salvageable tissue; the remaining 7 permitted noncontrast CT/CT angiography-based selection. IVT significantly improved excellent functional outcome at 90 days (mRS 0-1; 40.3% vs 33.2%, RR 1.21; 95% CI 1.13-1.30;  Extended-window IVT improves functional outcomes across a wider spectrum of stroke subgroups than previously recognized. The benefit seems greatest for patients with more severe strokes in settings where thrombectomy is unavailable, providing the evidence base for offering a critical reperfusion strategy for the substantial proportion of patients worldwide who lack timely access to thrombectomy. This study provides American Academy of Neurology Class I evidence that IVT administered 4.5-24 hours after moderate-to-severe AIS onset in patients with salvageable tissue, where thrombectomy is not readily available, improves functional outcome at 90 days without increasing mortality.
items.summary_ja:
背景：急性虚血性脳卒中（AIS）に対する静脈内血栓溶解療法（IVT）は、発症から4.5時間以内の患者に標準治療として推奨されているが、4.5～24時間の拡大時間窓での有効性については不明点が多い。  
方法：MEDLINEやCochrane Libraryなどを用いて、4.5時間以降にIVTを施行したAIS患者を対象とした18件のランダム化比較試験（RCT）を系統的にレビュー・メタ解析した。主要評価項目は90日後の修正Rankinスケール（mRS）0-1の優れた機能回復とし、安全性指標も評価した。  
結果：5,168例を含む解析で、IVT群は対照群に比べて90日後のmRS 0-1の割合が有意に高く（40.3% vs 33.2%、RR 1.21）、機能的独立性の改善も認められた。高度な画像診断を用いた患者選択が多い研究群で効果が顕著であり、血栓回収療法が利用できない中等度から重度の脳卒中患者で特に有効であった。  
結論：4.5～24時間の拡大時間窓においても、救済可能な脳組織を有するAIS患者に対するIVTは、血栓回収療法が利用困難な環境で機能予後を改善し、死亡率を増加させないことがアメリカ神経学会のクラスIエビデンスとして示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本メタ解析は、発症4.5～24時間後の急性虚血性脳卒中患者に対する静脈内血栓溶解療法（IVT）の効果を18件のRCTで検証した。IVTは90日後の優れた機能回復（mRS 0-1）を有意に改善し、特に血栓回収療法が利用困難な重症例で効果が顕著であった。死亡率増加は認められず、救済可能な脳組織を有する患者に対する拡大時間窓でのIVTの有効性と安全性を示すClass Iエビデンスを提供する。

items.title: Rapidly Progressive Alzheimer Disease and Related Dementias as a Phase Transition: Symptom Cascades and Survival Inflection.
items.abstract: Rapidly progressive Alzheimer disease and related dementias (rpADRD) is a clinically urgent syndrome characterized by accelerated deterioration. Because it is often confounded by acute etiologies, its definition remains poorly characterized. We aimed to evaluate rpADRD as a distinct clinical state, testing the hypothesis that it represents a clinical "phase transition" rather than a simple linear acceleration of typical neurodegenerative decline. Our objective was to define this transition threshold and quantify its impact on survival and disease trajectory. We conducted a retrospective cohort study using longitudinal data from participants recruited across US Alzheimer's Disease Research Centers. We defined incident rpADRD as dementia development (global Clinical Dementia Rating [CDR] ≥1) within 1 year of symptom onset, or progression to moderate-to-severe impairment (global CDR ≥2) within 2 years. To isolate primary neurodegeneration, we excluded prion, infectious, metabolic, toxic, and autoimmune etiologies. We used time-dependent Cox regression, multistate modeling, and restricted cubic spline analyses to model nonlinear survival dynamics. The final analysis cohort included 2,307 participants (mean baseline age 78.9 years; 57.1% female). Over a mean follow-up of 7.3 years, 270 patients (11.7%) developed incident rpADRD. Patients transitioning to rpADRD were older than non-rpADRD patients (mean 80.0 vs 78.8 years). Crucially, the transition to rpADRD was strongly associated with increased subsequent mortality (hazard ratio = 4.03; 95% CI 3.53-4.61,  These findings validate a clinical "phase transition" model for rpADRD, demonstrating that survival decline is not merely a linear function of disease severity. Rather, rpADRD constitutes a distinct state of clinical homeostatic failure fundamentally shifting subsequent mortality risk, often predicted by early neuropsychiatric symptoms. Recognizing this nonlinear shift is vital for accurate prognostication and segregation of rapidly progressing phenotypes in trials. Major limitations include reliance on observational data, potential recall bias regarding symptom onset, and the exclusion of neuroimaging and fluid biomarkers because of high missingness.
items.summary_ja: 背景：急速進行性アルツハイマー病および関連認知症（rpADRD）は、急激な症状悪化を特徴としながらも、急性疾患との鑑別が難しく定義が不明瞭である。方法：米国のアルツハイマー病研究センターで収集された2,307名の縦断データを用い、発症1年以内に認知症（CDR≥1）を発症、または2年以内に中等度以上の障害（CDR≥2）に進行した症例をrpADRDと定義。プリオン病や感染症などの二次的原因を除外し、時間依存性コックス回帰や多状態モデルを用いて生存曲線の非線形性を解析した。結果：平均年齢78.9歳、追跡期間7.3年のうち11.7％がrpADRDを発症。rpADRD移行患者は非rpADRD患者より高齢であり、移行後の死亡リスクは4倍に増加した（ハザード比4.03）。結論：rpADRDは単なる加速的進行ではなく、臨床的な「相転移」として捉えられ、生存率の急激な低下を伴う独立した病態である。早期の神経精神症状が予測因子となり、迅速進行型の識別と予後予測に重要である。観察研究の限界やバイアス、バイオマーカー欠如が課題。
items.summary_short_ja: 急速進行性アルツハイマー病および関連認知症（rpADRD）は、通常の神経変性疾患の単なる加速ではなく、臨床的な「相転移」として特徴づけられる。米国の研究センターの2,307例を解析し、rpADRDへの移行は生存率の急激な低下（死亡リスク4倍）と関連し、早期の神経精神症状が予測因子となることを示した。本研究はrpADRDを独立した臨床状態として捉え、予後予測や治療試験の対象選別に重要な知見を提供する。

items.title: Mechanism-Based Therapy With Ampreloxetine for Neurogenic Orthostatic Hypotension in Multiple System Atrophy: A Randomized Withdrawal Trial.
items.abstract: Degeneration of the central autonomic network with relative sparing of peripheral autonomic neurons underlies neurogenic orthostatic hypotension in patients with multiple system atrophy (MSA). Ampreloxetine, a novel, selective, norepinephrine (NE) reuptake inhibitor, allows once-daily dosing to precisely target residual peripheral autonomic neurons. Based on the hypothesis that patients with MSA would be most responsive and the substantial unmet need for symptomatic therapy in this population, an MSA subgroup analysis was prespecified. We conducted a run-in 4-week, parallel-group, randomized controlled trial (SEQUOIA), followed by a pivotal enriched randomized withdrawal (RW) trial with 16-week open-label treatment and 6 weeks of 1:1 RW (REDWOOD). Inclusion criteria for the MSA subgroup included (1) probable or possible MSA, (2) 3-minute orthostatic blood pressure (BP) fall >20/10 mm Hg, and (3) dizziness or lightheadedness score >4 points. Outcome measures included self-reported symptom burden captured on the 10-item OH Questionnaire (OHQ). Differences were analyzed using logistic regression and mixed-model repeated measures analysis. Seventy-three patients with MSA entered the program (mean age 63 years old [range: 43-80], 52% male). Both SEQUOIA and REDWOOD did not meet their primary endpoints. In REDWOOD, 40 (61%) fulfilled enrichment criteria and were randomized. After 16-week open-label, OHQ symptom assessment (OHSA) composite domain scores improved 2.6 ± (SD = 2.1) points from pretreatment. The proportion of participants with treatment failure at week 6 of RW treatment period was 40% in the placebo arm and 15% in the ampreloxetine arm ( In a prespecified subgroup analysis of MSA participants in the REDWOOD trial, patients randomized to placebo worsened, whereas those who were randomized to treatment maintained their open-label level of function. REDWOOD trial, NCT03829657; first submitted to registry January 10, 2019; first participant enrolled February 22, 2019. SEQUOIA trial, NCT03750552; first submitted to registry November 20, 2018; first participant enrolled January 24, 2019. See ClinicalTrials.gov for full-protocol and statistical analysis plan. This study provides Class III evidence that in patients with MSA who had symptomatic benefit on orthostatic hypotension with ampreloxetine, there was no difference in the odds of treatment failures between those maintained on ampreloxetine and those withdrawn to placebo.
items.summary_ja: 背景：多系統萎縮症（MSA）患者の神経原性起立性低血圧は、中枢自律神経ネットワークの変性に起因し、末梢自律神経は比較的温存されている。アンプレロキセチンは選択的ノルエピネフリン再取り込み阻害薬で、残存する末梢自律神経を標的に一日一回投与が可能である。方法：MSA患者を対象に、4週間のランイン期間を含むSEQUOIA試験（無作為化対照試験）と、16週間のオープンラベル治療後に6週間のランダム化撤退試験（REDWOOD）を実施した。評価は10項目の起立性低血圧質問票（OHQ）による自己申告症状を用いた。結果：73名のMSA患者が参加。主要評価項目は両試験とも達成されなかったが、REDWOOD試験の16週間オープンラベル期間でOHQスコアは平均2.6点改善。撤退期ではプラセボ群の40％が治療失敗となったのに対し、アンプレロキセチン群は15％であった。結論：MSA患者において、アンプレロキセチンは起立性低血圧の症状改善に寄与したが、撤退試験では治療維持群とプラセボ群の治療失敗率に有意差は認められなかった。
items.summary_short_ja: 多系統萎縮症（MSA）患者の神経性起立性低血圧に対し、選択的ノルエピネフリン再取り込み阻害薬アンプレロキセチンの効果を検証した。16週間の治療後、症状改善が認められたが、無作為化撤回試験では主要評価項目を達成せず、治療継続群とプラセボ群で治療失敗率に有意差はなかった。本研究はMSA患者におけるアンプレロキセチンの症状改善効果に関するクラスIIIのエビデンスを提供する。

items.title: Fracture Risk With Lacosamide vs Levetiracetam Monotherapy in Adults With Epilepsy.
items.abstract: Patients with epilepsy exhibit substantially elevated fracture risk. However, comparative skeletal safety data for newer antiseizure medications (ASMs) remain limited. The aim of this study was to compare fracture risk between lacosamide and levetiracetam monotherapy in adults with epilepsy. This retrospective cohort study used the TriNetX Global Collaborative Network. Adults with epilepsy initiating lacosamide or levetiracetam monotherapy were identified, excluding those receiving concomitant ASMs. Propensity score matching (1:1) balanced cohorts on demographics, comorbidities, and medications. The primary outcome was composite fracture (hip, cervical vertebra, and forearm). Cox regression estimated hazard ratios (HR) over 5-year follow-up. A sensitivity analysis requiring ≥6 prescription fills and excluding additional newer generation ASMs was performed. After matching, 20,888 patients remained per cohort with balanced covariates. Composite fracture occurred in 574 (2.86%) lacosamide-treated vs 418 (2.09%) levetiracetam-treated patients (HR 1.27; 95% CI 1.11-1.44;  Lacosamide monotherapy was associated with significantly higher fracture risk compared with levetiracetam. These findings should inform ASM selection in patients with elevated skeletal fragility. Limitations include residual confounding and the retrospective design that precludes causal inferences. This study provides Class III evidence that among adults with epilepsy receiving monotherapy, lacosamide is associated with a higher 5-year risk of fracture than levetiracetam.
items.summary_ja:
背景：てんかん患者は骨折リスクが高いが、新しい抗てんかん薬（ASM）の骨格安全性に関する比較データは限られている。  
方法：TriNetXデータベースを用いた後ろ向きコホート研究で、てんかん成人患者のうちラコサミド単剤療法群とレベチラセタム単剤療法群を抽出し、併用薬を除外。傾向スコアマッチング（1:1）により年齢や併存疾患などを調整した。主要評価項目は股関節、頸椎、前腕の複合骨折で、5年間の追跡期間中のハザード比（HR）をCox回帰で算出。感度分析も実施。  
結果：マッチング後、各群20,888例。複合骨折はラコサミド群で574例（2.86%）、レベチラセタム群で418例（2.09%）発生し、ラコサミド群の骨折リスクは有意に高く（HR 1.27、95%CI 1.11-1.44）示された。  
結論：てんかん成人の単剤療法において、ラコサミドはレベチラセタムよりも骨折リスクが高いことが示された。骨格脆弱性の高い患者のASM選択に留意が必要である。研究は後ろ向きで交絡因子の影響を完全には除外できない点が限界。
items.summary_short_ja: てんかん患者は骨折リスクが高いが、新しい抗てんかん薬の骨安全性比較は限られている。本研究は成人てんかん患者のラコサミド単剤療法とレベチラセタム単剤療法の骨折リスクを後ろ向きコホートで比較した。5年間追跡で、ラコサミド群はレベチラセタム群より複合骨折リスクが有意に高く（HR 1.27）、骨脆弱性のある患者の薬剤選択に示唆を与える。ただし因果関係は不明である。

items.title: Time to Treatment in Stroke Thrombectomy and Outcomes in the Extended Time Window: A Meta-Analysis.
items.abstract: Time to endovascular thrombectomy (EVT) is a critical determinant of outcomes for large vessel occlusion (LVO) strokes presenting within 6 hours of onset. Its impact in the extended (6-24-hour) window remains uncertain. We aimed to evaluate the association between treatment times and outcomes in this window. Individual patient-level data from 6 randomized trials enrolling patients in the extended window were pooled. The primary outcome was degree of disability at 90 days (modified Rankin Scale [mRS] 0-6). Secondary outcomes included functional independence (mRS 0-2), mortality, and symptomatic intracranial hemorrhage. Among 505 participants (median age 70 years; baseline NIH Stroke Scale 16; 51.3% female; advanced imaging selection 86.5%), 266 (52.7%) received EVT and 239 (47.3%) medical therapy alone. In EVT-treated patients, longer onset-to-randomization times were not associated with differences in disability (adjusted odds ratio [aOR] per 60 minutes 1.02; 95% CI 0.96-1.08;  This study demonstrates that the benefit of EVT is consistently preserved across the extended (6-24-hour) time window when patients are selected using advanced imaging criteria. In this highly selected population, enriched with slow progressors, the apparent increase in treatment effect with longer onset-to-presentation times reflects the validity of physiologic selection rather than true time insensitivity. However, this observation should not diminish the critical importance of time: imaging-based selection effectively resets the treatment clock, masking the harmful impact of prehospital delays. Notably, longer in-hospital delays were strongly associated with worse outcomes, reinforcing that "time is brain," even in extended-window cohorts.
items.summary_ja:
背景：脳梗塞に対する血管内血栓除去術（EVT）は、発症6時間以内の大血管閉塞（LVO）症例で治療時間が予後を左右する重要因子であるが、6～24時間の拡大時間窓での影響は不明であった。  
方法：拡大時間窓で登録された6つのランダム化試験から個別患者データを統合解析し、90日後の障害度（修正Rankinスケール[mRS]）を主要評価項目とした。副次評価項目は機能的自立（mRS 0-2）、死亡率、症候性頭蓋内出血とした。  
結果：505例（中央値年齢70歳、NIH Stroke Scale 16、女性51.3%、高度画像選択86.5%）のうち、266例がEVT施行。EVT群では発症からランダム化までの時間延長は障害度に有意な影響を示さなかった（調整オッズ比1.02/60分増）。一方、院内遅延は予後悪化と強く関連した。  
結論：高度画像選択により、6～24時間の拡大時間窓でもEVTの効果は維持されるが、これは生理学的選択によるものであり、時間の重要性を軽視すべきではない。特に院内遅延は脳損傷を悪化させるため、「時間は脳」であることが改めて示された。
items.summary_short_ja: 本メタ解析は、発症6～24時間の延長時間窓における脳血栓回収療法（EVT）の治療時間と転帰の関連を検討した。高度画像診断で選択された505例のうち、EVT群では発症から治療開始までの時間延長が障害度に有意な影響を与えなかった。一方、院内遅延は予後悪化と関連し、「時間は脳」を示唆する。高度画像選択により治療効果は維持されるが、迅速な治療開始の重要性は変わらない。
